title: bobea forsteri
intro: Bobea forsteri, also known as ma'o hau hele, is a type of flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, Bobea forsteri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
